title: GATE Policy Decision Record
description: JSON Schema contract for POLICY_DECISION audit event details (GATE Phase 2)

decision.description: True when the runtime policy stage allows the invocation; false when policy or invariant checks block it

reason.description: Human-readable policy or invariant decision reason

obligations.description: Policy obligations or invariant-denial tags that must be honored by the caller

policy_bundle_hash.description: Canonical hash of the evaluated policy, ABOM, or invariant bundle
